feed.title: kingasix TikTok
feed.subtitle: OK Boomer, all the latest TikToks from kingasix

entry.title: Here I am minding my business trying to steal a boat key and then this ninja ah were-zombie appears outta nowhere and hashes my slinging slasher… smdh 😒 #residentevil #blerd #vrgaming #gaming
entry.content: Here I am minding my business trying to steal a boat key and then this ninja ah were-zombie appears outta nowhere and hashes my slinging slasher… smdh 😒 #residentevil #blerd #vrgaming #gaming

entry.title: I was planning this surprise for my wife’s birthday for months and I messed it up at the last minute… 😭 Surprise or not, she enjoyed her gift and we have a foolish time over the weekend. #funny #birthday #blerd #fyp
entry.content: I was planning this surprise for my wife’s birthday for months and I messed it up at the last minute… 😭 Surprise or not, she enjoyed her gift and we have a foolish time over the weekend. #funny #birthday #blerd #fyp

entry.title: I become a whole new person behind the wheel of a FPS like Far Cry but this ain’t that… 😅 I can’t just go in guns blazing like I did in the attempt before this one. Imma be a far cry if I don’t stop playing around lol. #residentevil #blerd #gaming #vrgami
entry.content: I become a whole new person behind the wheel of a FPS like Far Cry but this ain’t that… 😅 I can’t just go in guns blazing like I did in the attempt before this one. Imma be a far cry if I don’t stop playing around lol. #residentevil #blerd #gaming #vrgami

entry.title: Ethan be acting like Resident Evil 7 never happened. I shouldn’t compare him to Leon but by Leon’s second adventure he was suplexing dudes. Get it together Ethan or we ain’t never finding our daughter… 😒 #residentevil #blerd #gaming #vrgaming #
entry.content: Ethan be acting like Resident Evil 7 never happened. I shouldn’t compare him to Leon but by Leon’s second adventure he was suplexing dudes. Get it together Ethan or we ain’t never finding our daughter… 😒 #residentevil #blerd #gaming #vrgaming #

entry.title: Ethan really be working my nerves. He almost had me act outta character and say some inflammatory shit. If this was real then Ethan would lose his daughter frfr #residentevil #blerd #gaming #vrgaming
entry.content: Ethan really be working my nerves. He almost had me act outta character and say some inflammatory shit. If this was real then Ethan would lose his daughter frfr #residentevil #blerd #gaming #vrgaming

entry.title: If do decide to do so it would be a long while from now, but I think I want to do video game retrospectives. I love watching them and I don’t talk about the various aspects of games enough. I would love to do retrospectives of Falcom games like Ys and Tra
entry.content: If do decide to do so it would be a long while from now, but I think I want to do video game retrospectives. I love watching them and I don’t talk about the various aspects of games enough. I would love to do retrospectives of Falcom games like Ys and Tra

entry.title: two years ago I made a video talking about a secret game within Pokemon Puzzle Challenge. I should redo this video since I am so much better at this content creation thing lol #onthisday #pokemon #blerd #fyp #gaming
entry.content: two years ago I made a video talking about a secret game within Pokemon Puzzle Challenge. I should redo this video since I am so much better at this content creation thing lol #onthisday #pokemon #blerd #fyp #gaming

entry.title: So this was my second attempt to make it across this bridge thing and I am sorry to this man but I made Ethan fish food more times then I’d like you to admit 😅 #residentevil #gaming #vrgaming #blerd
entry.content: So this was my second attempt to make it across this bridge thing and I am sorry to this man but I made Ethan fish food more times then I’d like you to admit 😅 #residentevil #gaming #vrgaming #blerd

entry.title: Man what’s going on with Chris?! Took my wife and my daughter from me and now he sneaking up on me. He lucky I can throw these paws in the game but imma get my get back eventually 😤 #residentevil #gaming #vrgaming #blerd #videogames
entry.content: Man what’s going on with Chris?! Took my wife and my daughter from me and now he sneaking up on me. He lucky I can throw these paws in the game but imma get my get back eventually 😤 #residentevil #gaming #vrgaming #blerd #videogames

entry.title: This tunnel was about to be my new home because why you snarling as I am making my way downtown… Now I’m hoping zombies aint walking fast around me… #residentevil #gaming #vrgaming #blerd #videogames
entry.content: This tunnel was about to be my new home because why you snarling as I am making my way downtown… Now I’m hoping zombies aint walking fast around me… #residentevil #gaming #vrgaming #blerd #videogames

entry.title: These lycan werewolf things really didn’t like me coming in their den and shooting up the spot… but that done mean you run on me swinging in like Tarzan. #residentevil #gaming #vrgaming #blerd #tarzan
entry.content: These lycan werewolf things really didn’t like me coming in their den and shooting up the spot… but that done mean you run on me swinging in like Tarzan. #residentevil #gaming #vrgaming #blerd #tarzan

entry.title: VR was acting up this day. Couldn’t aim for shit and they almost had me. Good thing this isn’t Horseshoes Evil or something. I will be findng my daughter and no one can stop me… #residentevil #gaming #blerd #fyp #vrgaming
entry.content: VR was acting up this day. Couldn’t aim for shit and they almost had me. Good thing this isn’t Horseshoes Evil or something. I will be findng my daughter and no one can stop me… #residentevil #gaming #blerd #fyp #vrgaming

entry.title: My guy had the greatest aim of all time. He literally hit me right in between my eyes. I don’t know what my black ass was thinking sticking my head out. 😭 #residentevil #gaming #blerd #vr #fyp
entry.content: My guy had the greatest aim of all time. He literally hit me right in between my eyes. I don’t know what my black ass was thinking sticking my head out. 😭 #residentevil #gaming #blerd #vr #fyp

entry.title: It was quitting time so I don’t know what I was thinking walking into his lair. Didn’t even care if I died lmao 😅 #residentevil #gaming #blerd #vrgaming #fypシ
entry.content: It was quitting time so I don’t know what I was thinking walking into his lair. Didn’t even care if I died lmao 😅 #residentevil #gaming #blerd #vrgaming #fypシ

entry.title: I’m bout to walk into the weekend just like I walked into this lycan den. Haphazardly and foolish. Shits been crazy and I haven’t been streaming much but that’ll change soon enough. #residentevil #videogames #gaming #blerd #vrgaming
entry.content: I’m bout to walk into the weekend just like I walked into this lycan den. Haphazardly and foolish. Shits been crazy and I haven’t been streaming much but that’ll change soon enough. #residentevil #videogames #gaming #blerd #vrgaming

entry.title: Finally got the Mega Man Star Force legacy collection and as a Battle Network fan I am jealous how much effort they put into this. Can’t wait to really dig into this. Had an issue with the last Resident Evil Village stream recordings but my last few clips
entry.content: Finally got the Mega Man Star Force legacy collection and as a Battle Network fan I am jealous how much effort they put into this. Can’t wait to really dig into this. Had an issue with the last Resident Evil Village stream recordings but my last few clips

entry.title: 😂 I damn near fought every ghost on this stage because I just couldn’t stop touching them. The game telling me don’t touch and I became Patrick Star. Don’t think Star Force will be the next game I stream but can’t wait to sit down with it. #gaming #blerd
entry.content: 😂 I damn near fought every ghost on this stage because I just couldn’t stop touching them. The game telling me don’t touch and I became Patrick Star. Don’t think Star Force will be the next game I stream but can’t wait to sit down with it. #gaming #blerd

entry.title: Playing Resident Evil Village in VR was a blast and I enjoyed every second of it but now that my daughter has been saved we need something new to play. I’d appreciate it if you’d help me decide. Give me your pick and don’t be afraid to make suggestions.
entry.content: Playing Resident Evil Village in VR was a blast and I enjoyed every second of it but now that my daughter has been saved we need something new to play. I’d appreciate it if you’d help me decide. Give me your pick and don’t be afraid to make suggestions.

entry.title: These last few weeks have been pretty rough on a fool but we still kicking… or should I say stomping 😅 We finished Resident Evil Village and until I settle on my next adventure, we’re just gonna stomp pedestrians out or whatever else. 🤷🏾‍♂️ #blerd #videog
entry.content: These last few weeks have been pretty rough on a fool but we still kicking… or should I say stomping 😅 We finished Resident Evil Village and until I settle on my next adventure, we’re just gonna stomp pedestrians out or whatever else. 🤷🏾‍♂️ #blerd #videog

entry.title: I don’t even know how to explain what happened in this clip. Keyboards controls shenanigans, Ballers shooting at me, rogue cab drivers… Just pure foolishness 😅 #blerd #videogames #gta #gaming #grandtheftauto
entry.content: I don’t even know how to explain what happened in this clip. Keyboards controls shenanigans, Ballers shooting at me, rogue cab drivers… Just pure foolishness 😅 #blerd #videogames #gta #gaming #grandtheftauto

entry.title: I was just tryna make it home and almost became big smoke. Got gangs and cops just gunning me down and tryna send me to the upper room. To be fair, I probably caused it. 😅 #blerd #videogames #gaming #gta #indiegames
entry.content: I was just tryna make it home and almost became big smoke. Got gangs and cops just gunning me down and tryna send me to the upper room. To be fair, I probably caused it. 😅 #blerd #videogames #gaming #gta #indiegames

entry.title: Thanks to my clever use of reverse psychology I was able to defeat and crush Medusa. She really thought that I thought she would beat me 😤 #blerd #videogames #gaming #retrogaming #castlevania
entry.content: Thanks to my clever use of reverse psychology I was able to defeat and crush Medusa. She really thought that I thought she would beat me 😤 #blerd #videogames #gaming #retrogaming #castlevania

entry.title: I’m just walking around looting the place when these zombies decided it was a good idea to ambush me. Could’ve lived your life undead but now you gotta re-die. 😤 #videogames #blerd #gaming #residentevil #undead
entry.content: I’m just walking around looting the place when these zombies decided it was a good idea to ambush me. Could’ve lived your life undead but now you gotta re-die. 😤 #videogames #blerd #gaming #residentevil #undead

entry.title: Bro! This guy was moving too viciously tryna catch me! I didn’t mean to blow his back out my grenade launcher 😭 ##videogames##blerd##gaming##residentevil##vrgaming
entry.content: Bro! This guy was moving too viciously tryna catch me! I didn’t mean to blow his back out my grenade launcher 😭 ##videogames##blerd##gaming##residentevil##vrgaming

entry.title: 😤 My sole objective is piecing my daughter back together and if you get in my way you getting blasted. #videogames #blerd #gaming #residentevil #vrgaming
entry.content: 😤 My sole objective is piecing my daughter back together and if you get in my way you getting blasted. #videogames #blerd #gaming #residentevil #vrgaming

entry.title: Decided to see what the fuss was about with this new Pragmata game and my god Capcom been killing it. We’ll definitely be adding this to my streaming backlog! #videogames #blerd #capcom #pragmata
entry.content: Decided to see what the fuss was about with this new Pragmata game and my god Capcom been killing it. We’ll definitely be adding this to my streaming backlog! #videogames #blerd #capcom #pragmata

entry.title: Throwback to last year when I was playing Momodora 4 talking about my favorite pizza. What’s your favorite pizza? Anything as unhinged as mine? My favorite is a bbq pizza with at least pineapple, anchovies, sausage, and onions. ##onthisday##blerd##indiega
entry.content: Throwback to last year when I was playing Momodora 4 talking about my favorite pizza. What’s your favorite pizza? Anything as unhinged as mine? My favorite is a bbq pizza with at least pineapple, anchovies, sausage, and onions. ##onthisday##blerd##indiega

entry.title: Combat in Pragmata is too much fun. I clicked with it immediately. I can’t wait to see how the full game expand on it. Dodging videos of folks playing it is difficult 😅 #blerd #videogames #capcom #pragmata
entry.content: Combat in Pragmata is too much fun. I clicked with it immediately. I can’t wait to see how the full game expand on it. Dodging videos of folks playing it is difficult 😅 #blerd #videogames #capcom #pragmata

entry.title: This is exactly why I can’t speedrun lol. I get a great time like this and immediately wonder if I can do better. It might be a minute before I can get Pragmata so I’ll have plenty of time to try. I already had my next stream game lined up but I might ha
entry.content: This is exactly why I can’t speedrun lol. I get a great time like this and immediately wonder if I can do better. It might be a minute before I can get Pragmata so I’ll have plenty of time to try. I already had my next stream game lined up but I might ha

entry.title: So I write these notes for my wife for her to read on her lunch break and I usually draw whatever on the top of it. A few days ago I tried drawing Toon Link and ended up making him look strung out and had to share. My version of Link has definitely seen b
entry.content: So I write these notes for my wife for her to read on her lunch break and I usually draw whatever on the top of it. A few days ago I tried drawing Toon Link and ended up making him look strung out and had to share. My version of Link has definitely seen b

entry.title: I was about to be grieving real differently if not for git. Good thing I’m not new to this… 😅 #fyp #indiegames #gamedev #gbstudio
entry.content: I was about to be grieving real differently if not for git. Good thing I’m not new to this… 😅 #fyp #indiegames #gamedev #gbstudio

entry.title: I should've left that damn box alone because now I'm missing a chuck of my ass, and it got me all in caution. Crow Country was a helluva a time... just be cautious. #crowcountry #indiegames #livehighlights
entry.content: I should've left that damn box alone because now I'm missing a chuck of my ass, and it got me all in caution. Crow Country was a helluva a time... just be cautious. #crowcountry #indiegames #livehighlights

entry.title: Seen a lot of discourse from the anti-melanin folks about how they take showers and while I think yall playing its nice to see these type of showers are available in Cyberpunk 2077… But seriously yall use soap and wash cloths, right….?
entry.content: Seen a lot of discourse from the anti-melanin folks about how they take showers and while I think yall playing its nice to see these type of showers are available in Cyberpunk 2077… But seriously yall use soap and wash cloths, right….?
